[EXPOSURE]
LATIN AMERICAN FUTURITY on the facade of EP7 from 25.04 to 30.04.
🗓 Opening, 28.04 at 7 p.m.!

This project aims to initiate a public debate on the concept of “Latin American futurity”. For this, Rolando J Carmona and 5 Latin American artists, also 5 women passionate about nature and mysticism, choose the digital facade of the EP7 as their support.

This exhibition will be accompanied by online interviews conducted by the curator with artists specializing in AI and digital post culture.

@violetforest.js (CO)
@orlyanan (CO/ISR)
@sofiacrespo (ARG)
@patrixdominguez (CL)
@biarritzzz (BR)
Curator @rolando_j_carmona

#ep7paris #paris #paris13 #digitalart #digitalart #latinamericanfuturity
